about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: About Us
about.vision.title: Our Vision
about.vision.summary: Helping {highlight} explore the world's cultural heritage sites, building a global network of cultural travel peace ambassadors.
about.vision.detail: Joinus is dedicated to being a bridge connecting the world's great cultural traditions. We believe that by personally visiting the birthplaces and heritage sites of various traditions, people can gain a deeper understanding of different cultural traditions, promoting dialogue and peace between civilizations.
about.values.title: Core Values
about.values.dialogue.title: Interfaith Dialogue
about.values.dialogue.desc: Covering twelve major traditions including Buddhism, Taoism, Christianity, and Islam, respecting every cultural tradition and promoting understanding and exchange between different traditions.
about.values.peace.title: Cultural Peace
about.values.peace.desc: Using travel as a bond and culture as a bridge, promoting global cultural peace and building a spiritual homeland for a shared human destiny.
about.values.digital.title: Digital Heritage
about.values.digital.desc: Leveraging modern technology to digitally preserve and share precious cultural heritage, enabling more people to learn and understand.
about.values.immersive.title: Immersive Experience
about.values.immersive.desc: Combining AI assistants, interactive maps, and cultural journey journals to provide users with deeply immersive cultural travel experiences.
about.trust.title: Platform Guarantees
about.team.title: Our Team
about.team.desc: Our team is composed of passionate partners in cultural research, travel services, and technological innovation. Team members come from diverse cultural backgrounds with rich experience in cultural studies, the tourism industry, and internet technology. We are dedicated to combining professional expertise with modern technology to create the finest cultural journey travel experience for our users.

sealDetail.faqMeaning: How to understand the deep meaning of "{name}"?
sealDetail.faqMeaningAnswer: Start by reciting the verse, then combine it with the essence and practice guide for deeper understanding. You can contemplate during meditation or ask AI for deeper interpretation.
sealDetail.faqOrder: What is the practice order of the Thirty Seals?
sealDetail.faqOrderAnswer: The Thirty Seals are divided into five series: Initial, Middle, Karmic, Enlightenment, and Return-to-Source. Practice them in order. Each seal is a milestone on your spiritual journey.
sealDetail.faqPilgrimage: How to combine seal practice with cultural journey?
sealDetail.faqPilgrimageAnswer: Choose heritage sites related to your current seal for meditation during your cultural journey. Record your practice experiences in your journey journal and share insights with the community.
sealDetail.faqPreparation: What preparation is needed for this seal?
sealDetail.faqPreparationAnswer: You need a sincere heart and a quiet environment. Read through all thirty seals first to understand the system, then dive deep one by one. Combine with daily practice.
sealDetail.tip1: Recite this seal's verse during daily meditation and contemplate its meaning
sealDetail.tip2: Deepen understanding through real experiences during cultural journeys
sealDetail.tip3: Record your insights and reflections in your cultural journey journal
sealDetail.recordInsightsDesc: Document your practice experience with this seal in your journal

trips.module.personal.subtitle: Solo journey, inner awakening
trips.module.personal.description: A solo cultural journey is a dialogue with your deepest self. In the ancient ancestral temples, release worldly concerns and rediscover your innate clarity — the path to true personal fulfillment.
trips.module.personal.empty: Every great journey begins with one person's awakening

trips.module.family.subtitle: Family together, blessings multiplied
trips.module.family.description: Walk ancestral temples with your family, let love ascend through tradition. A family cultural journey is more than travel — it is the finest way to pass on family traditions and cultivate shared wisdom toward true family harmony.
trips.module.family.empty: Walk the most precious path with those you love most
trips.module.family.emptyHint: Invite your family on a cultural journey together and feel the power of heritage
trips.module.enterprise.subtitle: Team cultivation, lasting legacy
trips.module.enterprise.description: Unite your team with ancestral temple wisdom and build a century-lasting corporate culture. Lead your core team through temples of millennia-old tradition to draw enduring business wisdom.

chat.subtitle: Joinus Cultural Travel Guide
chat.welcomeFull:
🙏 Hello! I'm Xiaohong, your wise cultural travel assistant.

I'm well-versed in 12 major cultural traditions, 60 heritage sites, and 27 ancestral temples around the world. Whether you want to learn about cultural journey routes, spiritual practices, or cultural wisdom, feel free to ask.

How can I help you today?

merchant.faq.booking: How do I book a service?
merchant.faq.bookingAnswer: Contact the merchant directly via phone or email, or use our in-app messaging to make a reservation.
merchant.faq.cancelAnswer: Most partners offer free cancellation up to 24 hours in advance. Please confirm the specific policy when booking.
merchant.faq.paymentAnswer: Partners typically accept WeChat Pay, Alipay, bank cards. International partners also accept PayPal and credit cards.
merchant.faq.groupAnswer: Groups of 10+ typically receive 10-20% off. Contact the merchant for specific group rates.
merchant.faq.languageAnswer: Many partners offer bilingual Chinese-English service. Premium guides may also offer Japanese and Korean.
merchant.faq.safety: What safety measures are in place?
merchant.faq.safetyAnswer: All partners are verified through our qualification review and on-site inspection. We provide full-journey protection and complaint handling.

templeDetail.announcementText: Limited offer: Book a route including this temple for early bird discount
templeDetail.faqHowToReachAnswer: {{name}} is located in {{country}}. You can get there by public transport or car. We recommend using the AI Planner for detailed directions.
templeDetail.faqBestTime: When is the best time to visit?
templeDetail.faqBestTimeAnswer: Spring and autumn are generally recommended, with pleasant weather and fewer tourists. Special ceremonies are held during cultural festivals.
templeDetail.faqTickets: Do I need to buy tickets?
templeDetail.faqTicketsAnswer: Ticket policies vary by temple. Some are free, while others charge a fee. Check route details or consult the AI Planner.
templeDetail.faqCeremoniesAnswer: Most temples regularly hold ceremonies and meditation retreats. Contact the temple office in advance for schedules.
templeDetail.faqVegetarianAnswer: Most temples have dining halls serving vegetarian meals. Some also offer accommodation; advance booking is required.
templeDetail.dressRequirement: Dress code: modest attire, some halls require removing shoes
templeDetail.dressCodeDesc: Dress modestly, cover shoulders and knees
templeDetail.photoRulesDesc: No photography or flash inside halls
templeDetail.keepQuietDesc: Maintain silence, set phone to silent mode
templeDetail.shoesOffDesc: Remove shoes before entering some halls
templeDetail.taboosDesc: Do not touch statues or point at deities
patriarchDetail.faqContribution: What are the main contributions of {{name}}?
patriarchDetail.faqContributionAnswer: As a great master, {{name}} made significant contributions to the spread of cultural thought and the construction of doctrinal systems, with far-reaching influence that remains an important guide for practitioners today.
patriarchDetail.faqVisitRelicsAnswer: Use the AI Planner to get recommended cultural journey routes including related temples and monasteries.
patriarchDetail.faqReadingsAnswer: Start with core teachings and gradually explore classical works. The Teachings section features important original texts and translations.
patriarchDetail.faqDeepStudy: How to study the teachings more deeply?
patriarchDetail.faqDeepStudyAnswer: Besides reading teachings, attend lectures and meditation retreats at related temples to experience the essence of the master's guidance.
patriarchDetail.learnBioDesc: Read the life story and historical background of {{name}}
patriarchDetail.learnTeachingDesc: Deep dive into core teachings and related wisdom
patriarchDetail.learnPilgrimageDesc: Visit related temples and monasteries in person
teachingDetail.insightCore: This teaching is one of the core doctrines of {{religion}} cultural heritage
teachingDetail.insightRecite: Recite and reflect during cultural journey for deeper understanding
teachingDetail.insightJournal: Record your insights in the Pilgrim Journal
teachingDetail.recordInsightsDesc: Write down your reflections on this teaching in the Pilgrim Journal
teachingDetail.faqCoreMeaning: What is the core meaning of "{{name}}"?
teachingDetail.faqCoreMeaningAnswer: This teaching is one of the core doctrines of {{religion}} cultural tradition, containing deep insights on practice and life. We recommend studying with the original text and commentary, or using the AI assistant.
teachingDetail.faqPractice: How to practice this teaching daily?
teachingDetail.faqPracticeAnswer: Read daily, reflect on its meaning, and find opportunities to practice in daily life. Deeper understanding comes through actual cultural journey experience.
teachingDetail.faqSuggestionsAnswer: Study related teachings together for a complete doctrinal understanding. Attend temple lectures or exchange insights with other practitioners in the community.
teachingDetail.faqRecordAnswer: The platform provides a Pilgrim Journal feature to record your reflections anytime. These records are valuable personal resources and can be shared with the community.
routeDetail.faqHowToBookAnswer: Select your departure date and number of travelers, click "Book Now", and you'll receive a confirmation email and e-ticket after payment.
routeDetail.faqCustomTripAnswer: Yes! Click "AI Planner Consultation" and our AI will customize a trip based on your needs, or contact customer service for manual customization.
routeDetail.faqWhatToPrepareAnswer: Check the "Travel Tips" section above for weather, clothing, and etiquette advice. We'll send detailed pre-trip information 3 days before departure.
routeDetail.faqGroupSizeAnswer: Groups typically have 6-15 people for an in-depth experience. Private tours are also available at a separate price.
routeDetail.faqMealsIncludedAnswer: Check the "Included" section above for specific inclusions. Generally includes full accommodation and some meals.
routeDetail.faqCancellation: How does the refund work for cancellations?
routeDetail.faqCancellationAnswer: Full refund 14 days before departure, 80% refund 7-13 days, 50% refund 3-6 days. See "Cancellation Policy" section.
routeDetail.whatToKnow: What would you like to know about "{{title}}"?
routeDetail.aiQ1: Is this route suitable for elderly?
routeDetail.pilgrimJournalsDesc: Read records and reflections from cultural travelers who walked this route
routeDetail.mapSummary: Passing {{sites}} heritage sites, {{days}} days {{nights}} nights total
routeDetail.cancellationForceNote: * In case of force majeure (natural disasters, pandemics, etc.), full refund is available. Refunds will be processed within 7 business days.
routeDetail.aiChatDetailRoute: I'd like to learn more about the route "{{title}}"
routeDetail.suitEasy: Suitable for all ages, no special fitness requirements
routeDetail.suitModerate: For travelers with moderate fitness, some mountain paths/stairs
routeDetail.suitChallenging: Requires good fitness, includes long treks or high altitude sections
routeDetail.forBeginnersDesc: Travelers experiencing cultural travel for the first time
routeDetail.forDevoteesDesc: Those seeking deep participation in rituals and spiritual practices
routeDetail.forCultureDesc: Interested in cultural history and architectural art
routeDetail.forPhotographyDesc: Rich photography subjects and dramatic lighting along the route
routeDetail.forFamilyDesc: Suitable for children to experience traditional cultural education
routeDetail.forSoloDesc: Perfect for quiet, deep personal spiritual journeys
routeDetail.guideReligionExp: Expert in {{religion}} cultural traditions and etiquette
routeDetail.kbygEtiquetteZen: Please maintain silence in Zen temples; phones on silent. No photography inside meditation halls. Arrive 15 minutes early for morning services.
routeDetail.kbygEtiquetteBuddhist: Dress modestly (cover knees and shoulders). Walk clockwise around stupas/Buddha images. Do not touch Buddha statues.
routeDetail.kbygEtiquetteTaoist: Maintain quiet respect in Taoist temples. Don't point at deity statues. Incense offerings are from the heart.
routeDetail.kbygEtiquetteChristian: Dress modestly in churches. Avoid walking during Mass. Check if photography is allowed.
routeDetail.kbygEtiquetteIslamic: Remove shoes before entering mosques. Women must wear headscarves. Don't disturb during prayer times.
routeDetail.kbygEtiquetteDefault: Please respect local cultural customs and traditions. Maintain a quiet and reverent attitude.
routeDetail.kbygFitnessEasy: Mostly gentle walking, no special fitness required. Suitable for all ages.
routeDetail.kbygFitnessModerate: Includes some mountain paths and stairs. Basic walking ability recommended. ~5-8km daily walking.
routeDetail.kbygFitnessChallenging: Contains long mountain trails or high altitude sections. Hiking experience recommended. Daily walking may exceed 10km.
routeDetail.kbygPackingItems: Comfortable walking shoes, sun protection, rain gear, warm jacket (mountains), personal medications, power bank
routeDetail.kbygTempleDesc: Some stops include temple accommodation or morning service experience. Temple schedules are strict (typically 4:00-5:00 AM morning chant). Adjust your sleep schedule. Vegetarian meals provided; bring snacks if needed.

prices.tip1.title: Book 60 Days Ahead
prices.tip1.desc: Data shows booking 2 months in advance can save 15-25% on route costs
prices.tip2.title: Travel Off-Peak
prices.tip2.desc: Avoid peak seasons like holidays — same routes can be 30%+ cheaper
prices.tip3.title: Group Discounts
prices.tip3.desc: Groups of 3+ enjoy team discounts, with select routes at 10% off
prices.tip4.title: Set Alerts
prices.tip4.desc: Use price alerts to get notified the moment your favorite route drops
prices.step1.title: Choose a Route
prices.step1.desc: Browse our curated cultural journey routes and pick your dream destination
prices.step2.title: Compare Prices
prices.step2.desc: Check the price calendar and trend charts to find the best time and lowest price
prices.step3.title: Set Alerts
prices.step3.desc: Enable drop alerts and get notified instantly when prices hit your target
prices.faq1.a: Our system monitors price changes 24/7 to ensure you always see the latest prices. Prices may fluctuate more during holidays and peak seasons.
prices.faq2.q: How do I get the lowest price?
prices.faq2.a: We recommend booking 60+ days ahead, using the price calendar to find historical low periods, and enabling drop alerts. Groups of 3+ also get extra discounts.
prices.faq3.a: Route prices typically include transportation, accommodation, entrance fees, and guide services. Exact inclusions vary by route. Visa fees and personal expenses are not included.
prices.faq4.a: We support WeChat Pay, Alipay, Visa/Mastercard, and UnionPay, covering major domestic and international payment channels.
prices.ctaDesc: Set price alerts and get notified the moment your favorite route drops

prices.packages.subtitle: All-inclusive, worry-free travel
prices.deal.title: Flash Sale · Save Up to 30%

prices.bestTime.subtitle: Data-driven insights to help you buy at the right moment
prices.bestTime.advanceBookDesc: Booking 45-60 days ahead saves an average of 22% on route costs
prices.bestTime.avoidPeakDesc: Feb, Jun & Nov are historically the cheapest months to travel
prices.bestTime.weekdayDesc: Tue-Thu departures are ~12% cheaper than weekends
prices.bestTime.recText: Prices are currently at a seasonal low. Historical data shows prices will rise ~8% in the next 2 weeks — book now.

prices.budget.note: * These are estimates only. Final costs are determined at checkout. Route fee based on current lowest route price.

religions.heroDesc: Spanning millennia, explore the 12 great cultural traditions that shaped human civilization. From Eastern Zen to Western spirituality, each tradition is a crystallization of wisdom.
religions.featureCultureDesc: Each tradition comes with professional historical origins, core doctrines, and cultural impact analysis
religions.featureNetworkDesc: Covering {sites} heritage sites across {countries} countries with precise GPS coordinates
religions.featureRoutesDesc: Carefully designed cultural routes connecting core heritage sites and ancestral temples of each tradition
religions.exploreTitle: Explore the Twelve Great Cultural Traditions
religions.exploreDesc: Click any tradition to discover its history, heritage sites, and patriarchs
religions.businessDesc: How millennia-old wisdom shapes enduring corporate culture foundations
religions.faq1Q: How were the Twelve Great Cultural Traditions selected?
religions.faq1A: Based on global number of followers, historical influence, and richness of cultural heritage, covering Buddhism, Taoism, Christianity, Islam, Hinduism, Judaism, Confucianism, Sikhism, Shinto, Tibetan Buddhism, Indigenous Spirituality, and Baha'i Faith.
religions.faq2A: An Ancestral Temple is the birthplace of a cultural tradition or the core monastery where patriarchs once preached. It serves as the foundation of cultural transmission, carrying the purest dharma lineage of the tradition.
religions.faq3Q: How to plan a cultural journey trip?
religions.faq3A: You can use our AI-powered trip planner to automatically generate optimal cultural journey routes based on your cultural preferences, time budget, and physical condition. You can also directly choose our curated premium routes.
religions.faq4Q: What languages does the platform support?
religions.faq4A: Currently supporting 7 languages including Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean, Thai, Hindi, and Arabic, covering major cultural journey communities worldwide.
religions.ctaDesc: Join 100,000+ cultural travelers worldwide, explore ancient wisdom, and step into heritage halls around the world
religions.eraSubtitle: From ancient civilizations to modern times, feel the evolution of cultural traditions
religions.mapSubtitle: Explore the distribution of heritage sites across continents

religions.quizResultDesc: Based on your answers, the cultural tradition that best fits you is
religions.quizQ1: What do you value most in a spiritual journey?
religions.quizQ1O2: Personal connection with a divine presence
religions.quizQ2: Which worldview resonates most with you?
religions.quizQ2O1: The universe is divine consciousness; all things have spirit
religions.quizQ2O2: Follow the natural Way — effortless action, harmony with nature
religions.quizQ2O3: One all-knowing, all-powerful Creator guides existence
religions.quizQ2O4: Prophetic revelation guides humanity toward justice
religions.quizQ3: What do you most hope to gain from a cultural journey?
religions.quizQ3O3: A universal mission of peace for all humanity
religions.quizQ3O4: Primal connection with the earth and nature spirits

confucian.schools.title: Five Major Schools
confucian.schools.preqinDesc: Founded by Confucius, developed by Mencius and Xunzi. Ren-Yi-Li-Zhi-Xin, education for all, the debate on human nature.
confucian.schools.hantangDesc: Dong Zhongshu established Confucianism as state ideology. Zheng Xuan annotated all classics. Han Yu championed the Daotong theory.
confucian.schools.songmingDesc: Zhou Dunyi founded it, the Cheng brothers developed it, Zhu Xi synthesized it. Investigation of things, Heavenly Principle, Four Books commentary.
confucian.schools.yangmingDesc: Wang Yangming created the three propositions: Mind is Principle, Unity of Knowledge and Action, Extension of Innate Knowledge.
confucian.schools.modernDesc: Xiong Shili's return to roots, Mou Zongsan's East-West synthesis, the 1958 New Confucian Manifesto — Confucianism reborn in the modern world.

holysite.travelerTypes.title: Traveler Types
holysite.dressReminder: Dress modestly, no photography in halls
holysite.faq.a1: {name} is located in {country}. You can reach it by public transport or driving. Check specific routes in advance; some sites may require walking.
holysite.faq.q2: When is the best time to visit?
holysite.faq.a2: Spring and autumn are generally recommended — pleasant weather and fewer crowds. Cultural festivals feature special events but are busier.
holysite.faq.a3: Ticket policies vary. Some are free, others charge a maintenance fee. Check route details or ask the AI planner.
holysite.faq.a4: Most heritage sites have accommodation options ranging from hostels to meditation retreats. Route packages include curated lodging.
holysite.faq.a5: Modest dress is usually required — avoid revealing clothing. Some halls require removing shoes. Respect local cultural customs.
holysite.faq.a6: Outdoor photography is usually allowed. Indoor halls may prohibit it. Follow posted signs and respect the rules.

tripCreate.aiPlanningHint: XiaoHong is matching your needs against the global ancestral temple database...
tripCreate.aiPlanningHeadline: Xiaohong is crafting your cultural journey
tripCreate.aiQuote1: When the heart travels far, the body has begun the cultural journey
tripCreate.aiQuote2: A flower holds a world; a leaf, enlightenment
tripCreate.aiQuote3: Ancestral temples endure for millennia; aspirations are boundless
tripCreate.aiQuote4: With sincere heart, far journeys bring great blessings
tripCreate.aiQuote5: A mountain need not be tall — if a sage dwells, it is renowned
tripCreate.aiQuote6: One robe of the Sixth Patriarch — five thousand years of wisdom passed on
tripCreate.aiQuote7: With sincere reverence, every place is a precious ground
tripCreate.aiQuote8: Light beneath your feet, Buddha within your heart
tripCreate.aiQuote9: Walk ten thousand miles, embrace a thousand years of history
tripCreate.aiQuote10: The pilgrim's heart is itself the practice
tripCreate.aiQuote11: A thousand rivers reflect a thousand moons; ten thousand miles of clear sky
tripCreate.aiQuote12: Conditions arise without ceasing; aspirations and journeys are endless
